steps.title: Identify the function
steps.content: The underlined portion adds: solving the spawning mystery would also "sustain several other species that rely on them as a food source." That extends the benefit of the conservation work beyond just the eels.

steps.title: Match to a choice
steps.content:
Choice C says "the benefit... extends beyond the eels" — exactly that function.

  • A claims a study finding (no study mentioned)
  • B claims scientists prefer other species (not supported)
  • D mischaracterizes the eels' role as ecosystem support generally rather than the conservation benefit's reach
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
